sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112415" key="frugeu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φρυγ-εύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0513.tlg001:53" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theopomp.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">53</biblScope></bibl>. <sense n="II" id="n112415.0" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who roasts,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:181" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.181</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
